languages.text: Эоганн пал от руки свое{mf|го|ей} бывш{mf|его|ей} соратник{mf|а|цы}, как и многие Механикус Простора. Все накопленные им знания о технологиях ксеносов оказались бессильны против той чудовищной мощи, которую обрушил{mf||а} на него {mf|тот|та}, кто ранее носил{mf||а} имя {name} фон Валанциус.

Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Эоганн пал от руки свое{mf|го|ей} бывш{mf|его|ей} соратник{mf|а|цы}, как и многие Механикус Простора. Все накопленные им знания о технологиях ксеносов оказались бессильны против той чудовищной мощи, которую обрушил{mf||а} на него {mf|тот|та}, кто ранее носил{mf||а} имя {name} фон Валанциус.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

languages.text: エオガンはかつての仲間の手に、そしてエクスパンスに広がる機械神殿の多くの者と共に倒れた。異星技術の知識を蓄えた彼の全ては、かつて{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスと呼ばれた者によって解放された恐るべき力に対して無力だった。
languages.original_text: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: エオグンはかつての仲間の手に、そしてエクスパンスに広がる機械神殿の多くの者と共に倒れた。異星技術の知識を蓄えた彼の全ては、かつて{name}・フォン・ヴァランシウスと呼ばれた者によって解放された恐るべき力に対して無力だった。

languages.text: 伊奥贡死在了昔日战友的手中，一同罹难的还有扩区中的许多机械修会成员。他毕生积累的异形技术知识，在那个曾名为{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯的人所释放的可怕力量面前，不值一提。
languages.original_text: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡死在了昔日战友的手中，一同罹难的还有扩区中的许多机械修会成员。他毕生积累的异形技术知识，在那个曾名为{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯的人所释放的可怕力量面前，不值一提。

languages.text: Eogunn fut tué par son {mf|ancien|ancienne} camarade, de même qu'un grand nombre des membres de l'Adeptus Mechanicus dans les Étendues. Tout le savoir qu'il avait accumulé sur la xénotechnologie ne lui fut d'aucun secours face à la puissance monstrueuse déchaînée contre lui par {mf|celui|celle} qui portait autrefois le nom de {name} von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn fut tué par son {mf|ancien|ancienne} camarade, de même qu'un grand nombre des membres de l'Adeptus Mechanicus dans les Étendues. Tout le savoir qu'il avait accumulé sur la xénotechnologie ne lui fut d'aucun secours face à la puissance monstrueuse déchaînée contre lui par {mf|celui|celle} qui portait autrefois le nom de {name} von Valancius.

languages.text: Eogunn cayó a manos de su antiguo camarada, junto con muchos miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus en la Extensión. Todos los conocimientos sobre xenotecnología que había acumulado no sirvieron de nada ante el monstruoso poder que portaba el ser antes conocido como {name} von Valancius.
languages.original_text: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn cayó a manos de su antiguo camarada, junto con muchos miembros del Adeptus Mechanicus en la Extensión. Todos los conocimientos sobre xenotecnología que había acumulado no sirvieron de nada ante el monstruoso poder que portaba el ser antes conocido como {name} von Valancius.

languages.text: Eogunn, Enginlik'teki Adeptus Mechanicus mensuplarıyla birlikte eski yoldaşının elinde can verdi. Zeno teknolojisi hakkında topladığı bilgiler, bir zamanlar {name} von Valancius adını taşıyan kimsenin korkunç gücüne karşı bir hiçti.
languages.original_text: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, Enginlik'teki Adeptus Mechanicus mensuplarıyla birlikte eski yoldaşının elinde can verdi. Zeno teknolojisi hakkında topladığı bilgiler, bir zamanlar {name} von Valancius adını taşıyan kimsenin korkunç gücüne karşı bir hiçti.

languages.text: Eogunn selbst fiel wie viele andere Mitglieder des Adeptus Mechanicus in der Ausdehnung durch die Hand {mf|seines einstigen Kameraden|seiner einstigen Kameradin}. All sein gesammeltes Wissen über Xenotech war nichts gegen die monströse Macht, die das Wesen entfesselte, das einst den Namen {name} von Valancius getragen hatte.
languages.original_text: Eogunn fell at the hand of his former comrade, along with many of the Adeptus Mechanicus in the Expanse. All his accumulated knowledge of xenotechnology was nothing against the monstrous power unleashed upon him by the one who had formerly borne the name {name} von Valancius.

All sein gesammeltes Wissen über Xenotech war nichts gegen die monströse Macht, die das Wesen entfesselte, das einst den Namen {name} von Valancius getragen hatte.
